$comment: schema_version=1.0.0 | Frozen 2026-06-03 | Format for .task-locks/snapshots/snapshot_N.json. The genesis_hash field is a verified constant: SHA-256(JSON.stringify(sortedKeys(genesis.json))) = 1eb7528ebb64a57fb9b8b567bc9b613911aa3c213e7aaf731ce3fbdc77584eb1
title: NOVA 2.5 Registry Snapshot
description: A point-in-time checkpoint of the full registry state at a given event_index. Produced by snapshot-writer.mjs. Referenced by SNAPSHOT_CREATED events in TASK_EVENTS.jsonl.

snapshot_version.description: Schema version of this snapshot file format. Increment on breaking changes to the snapshot format.

projection_version.description: Version of the projection algorithm that produced the registry field. Must match engine_version in transitions.yaml at the time of snapshot.

snapshot_index.description: Zero-based index N. Matches the filename snapshot_N.json and the snapshot_index field in the corresponding SNAPSHOT_CREATED event.

event_index.description: The event_index of the last event consumed to produce this snapshot. The snapshot represents the state of the registry AFTER this event was applied.

event_hash.description: The event_hash of the event at event_index. Allows the audit tool to verify this snapshot references a real, unmodified event.

genesis_hash.description: Constant: SHA-256(JSON.stringify(sortedKeys(.task-locks/genesis.json))). Value: 1eb7528ebb64a57fb9b8b567bc9b613911aa3c213e7aaf731ce3fbdc77584eb1. Allows detecting genesis.json tampering from any snapshot file.

registry.description: Full contents of .task-locks/registry.json at event_index. Shape defined by registry.schema.json.
